title: bufonia ephedrina
intro: Bufonia ephedrina, also known as Ephedrantha, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant contains ephedrine, a stimulant that has been used for its medicinal properties, including decongestant and bronchodilator effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Bufonia ephedrina include its ability to boost energy, improve mental clarity, and aid in weight loss, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Bufonia ephedrina is often prepared as a dried herb, tea, or extract, and its preparations are commonly used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
